summary: Excellent Charlie Miller‑remastered soundboard captures a fiery, solid 1984 Ventura performance that many fans rank among the year’s best.
review: The recording is praised for its crisp, remastered soundboard quality, with only minor early‑track quirks noted. The show itself is described as “on fire” and one of the standout performances of 1984, even if a few listeners found it merely average compared to other summer scorchers.

ai_rating.rationale: Four detailed reviews give an average of 4‑star ratings, with strong praise for both performance and audio quality; the weighting favors the high show scores.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Charlie Miller remaster provides excellent clarity after the first track; reviewers note fine‑sounding boards with no major glitches.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the set as consistently energetic and “on fire,” though one reviewer calls it average compared to other scorching summer shows; overall the pacing is lively and enjoyable.
